title: List of all professional job skills in commerce field.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: List of all professional job skills in commerce field.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Financial analysis and reporting skills

2. Budgeting and forecasting skills

3. Accounting and bookkeeping skills

4. Taxation and audit skills

5. Business valuations and analysis skills

6. Investment analysis and management skills

7. Knowledge of financial markets and instruments

8. Risk management and assessment skills

9. Compliance and regulatory knowledge

10. Financial modeling skills

11. Negotiation and persuasion skills

12. Team management and leadership skills

13. Strategic planning and implementation skills

14. Sales and marketing skills

15. Business development skills

16. Customer relationship management skills

17. Data analysis and statistical skills

18. Information technology skills

19. Communication and presentation skills

20. Interpersonal and networking skills.
